top.title: 'What is the game plan?': The Iran war is unsettling China and its ambitions
top.summary: China is not feeling the shock of war in the Middle East - yet. But it is feeling the ripples.

top.title: Trump cuts his losses on Noem after controversial tenure at homeland security
top.summary: Noem was one of the administration's brightest stars when she stepped into the role, but has faced a mounting backlash in recent months.

top.title: US and Venezuela agree to resume diplomatic ties after Maduro capture
top.summary: The US said the two sides would make joint efforts to promote stability after the US seized Maduro and his wife.

top.title: TfL hack in 2024 affected around 10 million people, BBC can reveal
top.summary: TfL insists it has "kept customers informed throughout this incident and will continue to take all necessary action".

top.title: Anthropic vows to sue Pentagon over risk designation
top.summary: The supply chain risk designation of the artificial intelligence firm is a first for a US company.

top.title: Musk tells jury 'people read too much' into his posts
